awards.title: Shirley Chisholm Trailblazer Award
awards.description: Named after Shirley Chisholm, the first Black woman elected to Congress and the first woman to run for President in a major party, this award recognizes graduate students who demonstrate exceptional leadership, scholarship, and commitment to social justice in education.

education.note: Thesis: Curriculum of the Body — A Foucauldian Analysis of the Physical and Emotional Violence Inflicted on Female Students in Indian Schools

education.institution: Lady Shri Ram College, University of Delhi
education.note: Foundation in literary analysis, critical theory, and the humanities that informs my approach to curriculum design and educational research.
